creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
Em 8 de dezembro de 2011 18:12, Florian Degner <f.degner@gmx.de> escreveu:
> On Wed, 07 Dec 2011 20:38:39 +0100, Sylvio C=E9sar Teixeira Amorim
> <scjamorim@bsd.com.br> wrote:
>
>> Em 7 de dezembro de 2011 17:11, Florian Degner <f.degner@gmx.de> escreve=
u:
>>>
>>> On Wed, 07 Dec 2011 01:36:47 +0100, Sylvio C=E9sar Teixeira Amorim
>>> <scjamorim@bsd.com.br> wrote:
>>>
>>>> 2011/11/21 Thomas Abthorpe <tabthorpe@freebsd.org>:
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> The following reply was made to PR ports/162473; it has been noted by
>>>>> GNATS.
>>>>>
>>>>> From: Thomas Abthorpe <tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org>
>>>>> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, f.degner@gmx.de
>>>>> Cc:
>>>>> Subject: Re: ports/162473: Building math/pspp from ports fails.
>>>>> Date: Mon, 21 Nov 2011 00:30:59 -0500
>>>>>
>>>>> =A0Hi Florian
>>>>>
>>>>> =A0I have been able to build this on my 8-STABLE environment, as well=
 as
>>>>> a
>>>>> =A07/8/9/10 tinderbox.
>>>>>
>>>>> =A0My advice would be to update your ports tree to current, rebuild
>>>>> =A0relevant ports and try install again.
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> =A0Thomas
>>>>>
>>>>> =A0--
>>>>> =A0Thomas Abthorpe =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0| FreeBSD Committer
>>>>> =A0tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org =A0| http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe
>>>>
>>>>
>>>>
>>>> Hi Florian,
>>>>
>>>> =A0 This problem was fixed? Can I close this PR?
>>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Hi Sylvio,
>>>
>>> Shame on me, I totally forgot about it. I'll check it ASAP and report
>>> back
>>> within 24h.
>>>
>>>
>>> LG, Flo
>>
>>
>> Ok.
>>
>
> *cough* ... touch=E9! :D
>
> While the portupgrade on the box where the problem occurred is still runn=
ing
> (40km away, waiting for someone to press "y"), I successfully compiled an=
d
> install math/pspp on _this_ box (which is basically the same as the "prob=
lem
> box" but with an up-to-date ports tree).
>
> So yes, please close it. Looks like the problem was on my side.
>
>
> LG, Flo

Thanks Florian.
